title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that gives AI agents fluency in tools, models, and scientific databases. It integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL to accelerate research workflows from hypothesis to wet-lab experiment design.
